title: HappyVisual
description: A client-side visual utility mod that adds a customizable HUD and interface elements.
body:
## About

This is a **client-side visual utility mod** for Minecraft that adds a customizable interface and visual HUD elements.

## Features

- TargetInfo showing target health, armor, and held item  
- Customizable interface elements  
- In-game configuration menu (opens with **Right Shift** by default)  
- Color palette and visual customization  
- Modular system with toggleable features  

## Configuration

All settings can be changed directly in-game using a simple and intuitive graphical interface.
No game restart is required after changing settings.

## Compatibility

- **Type:** Client-side mod  
- **Minecraft version:** 1.16.5  
- **Loader:** Forge  

## Notes

- This mod runs only on the client and does not require installation on the server  
- Does not modify world data  
- Intended for visual customization and informational purposes
